title: Branded documentation portal
scenario: Build a KnowMe-branded documentation portal with content classification, canonical source docs, Flat 2.0 light/dark themes, Mermaid/search, GitHub Pages, container delivery, sanitization, accessibility, screenshots, OpenGraph image metadata, recovery, and publication proof.
termination: Stop only when the site builds from canonical source, contains no private material, is visibly KnowMe-branded in light/dark Flat 2.0, supports Mermaid/search, publishes to GitHub Pages or a configured target, exposes OpenGraph metadata, and passes critic review.

prompts.prerequisites: Verify content owner, public/private classification, brand source, site framework choice, GitHub Pages target, OpenGraph image, search strategy, and container delivery need.
prompts.discovery: Read documentation source tree, content-source manifest, KnowMe UI standard, Flat 2.0 rules, Docusaurus/Starlight decision notes, Pages workflow, sanitizer, and OpenGraph assets.
prompts.feynman: Explain how content moves from private/project memory into public docs safely, how brand tokens implement Flat 2.0, and how Pages/container publication is proven.
prompts.kbd_assess: Assess content taxonomy, private/public boundary, branding, navigation, search, Mermaid, Pages URL, container, screenshots, accessibility, and OpenGraph thumbnail behavior.
prompts.kbd_analyze: Analyze current docs, site config, theme CSS, content source manifest, sanitizer patterns, GitHub Actions, Pages settings, static assets, and generated routes.
prompts.kbd_spec: Specify canonical source ownership, sanitized content classes, KnowMe branding, no-border Flat 2.0 themes, Mermaid/search, Pages workflow, docs container, OpenGraph tags, accessibility gates, and screenshots.
prompts.kbd_plan: Plan content classification first, then source migration, theme tokens, navigation/search/Mermaid, sanitizer, OpenGraph asset, Pages/container build, visual/a11y checks, critic, and retention.
prompts.research: Use official framework, GitHub Pages, OpenGraph, Mermaid, search, and accessibility docs when capabilities or configuration may have changed.
prompts.implementation: Edit canonical docs and site source only. Do not publish raw memory or private paths. Use supported theme variables before swizzling. Keep all default branding removed.
prompts.public_boundary_verification: Run sanitize, schema checks, production build, local serve or Pages URL check, representative route checks, OpenGraph metadata inspection, and light/dark visual review.
prompts.independent_critic: Review whether the site is actually branded, private content is absent, Flat 2.0 has no decorative borders/shadows, Mermaid/search work, OpenGraph points to the expected image, and Pages/container proof exists.
prompts.reflection_retention: Record publication evidence, redactions, theme decisions, broken-link fixes, OpenGraph proof, and reusable docs-skill improvements.
prompts.recovery: If private content leaks or build publication fails twice, stop and repair classification/sanitizer before adding content.
prompts.stop_conditions: Stop for private raw content, default branding, missing OpenGraph image, broken build, unverified Pages publication, inaccessible navigation, or unsupported framework claims.
